changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 18 18:00): ZERO de-escalation signals. Iran FM calls diplomacy 'delusional'. Hormuz effectively blockaded. Israel wide-scale strikes on Tehran. Lebanon ground invasion expanding. Oil >$100. No ceasefire in ANY theater.

latest_news.headline: Israeli tank fire hits UNIFIL position, wounds Ghanaian peacekeepers - UN inquiry confirms
latest_news.text: Initial UN internal inquiry confirms Israeli tank fire hit UN position in southern Lebanon on March 6, wounding Ghanaian peacekeepers. Growing risks as IDF operations intensify near UNIFIL zones.

latest_news.headline: Iranian militia rockets hit Baghdad's Al-Rashid Hotel where European diplomats were staying
latest_news.text: Shiite militias in Iraq attacked the Al-Rashid Hotel in Baghdad's Green Zone where a European diplomatic delegation was staying. Also struck US Embassy, Victoria Base, Erbil bases. Abu Ali Al-Askari (Hezbollah Brigades spokesperson) killed in US strike.

latest_news.headline: 7,000+ targets struck in Iran, IRGC Navy HQ in Tehran hit, 100+ Iranian ships destroyed
latest_news.text: CENTCOM data: 7,000+ targets attacked, 6,500+ sorties, 100+ ships destroyed. Tehran, Isfahan, Bandar Abbas, Karaj, Shiraz, Tabriz, Kermanshah all struck in past 24h. IRGC Navy HQ and regime intelligence HQ targeted in Tehran.

latest_news.headline: 1,049,328 displaced in Lebanon - nearly 1 in 5 citizens
latest_news.source: Al Jazeera / Lebanese Disaster Risk Mgmt Unit
latest_news.text: Official displaced count reaches 1,049,328. 132,742 in shelters. Evacuation orders cover 1,470 sq km (14% of Lebanon). Shelter capacity overwhelmed - many sleeping in streets and vehicles.

latest_news.headline: Iran launches 12 attack waves on Israel (March 16), 257 total since war began - daily trend declining
latest_news.text: 12 waves on March 16: 4x Tel Aviv area, 4x south, 2x north, 2x Jerusalem. 257 total waves since campaign start. Daily attacks declining from peak (55 on March 1) to current lower sustained rate.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 20, 20:04 UTC) - Israel ground invasion expanding: IDF targets Khiam, months-long presence. 5 Lebanese soldiers wounded. 1M+ displaced. US strikes Kharg Island. Fujairah fire day 2. Trump reverses NATO stance, going unilateral on Hormuz. NCTC Director Kent resigned. 21 vessel incidents. Zero ceasefire signals.
